title: Silver Plated Football Money Box - New Baby, Christening Boys Present
features: The detail is fantastic - it even has studs on the sole! There is a slot in the top for putting coins and a 'bung' underneath for emptying purposes.
Gift for all occasions - Christening Gift, New Baby Boy, Boys Gift
A nice quality silver plated item which comes boxed.
With Christmas fast approaching - this would also make a great Xmas Gift or stocking filler.
